message:
🐛 Fix TMDB-only mode: show detail, episodes, and missing helper methods (#23)

- Add _enrichSeasons and _enrichEpisodesWithTmdb helper methods
- Add TMDB fallback in getEpisodes() via _getEpisodesFromTmdb()
- Add TMDB fallback in getShowDetail() via _getShowDetailFromTmdb()
- Add title, year fields to TmdbShowDetail for proper show info
- Use initialShow as fallback in ShowDetailScreen when provider returns null

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
